preambleHtml: How we actually treat each other — plain language, same standards we use in voice. Firm where safety needs it; warm day-to-day. If that sits right, you'll fit in.

tenets.headline: Crew over clout.
tenets.bodyHtml: We stack as a crew. Solidarity over everything. We look out for each other in and out of game.

tenets.headline: Comrades, regardless.
tenets.bodyHtml: Good faith is enough; your identity is your own. We have each other's backs.

tenets.headline: Safety is the floor.
tenets.bodyHtml: Racism, transphobia, homophobia, misogyny, ableism, fascism, cop apologia. We do not fuckin' do it. This space is for the people.

tenets.headline: Exfil together. Always.
tenets.bodyHtml: Nobody left at extract. Bad runs happen; we run it back.

tenets.headline: Your life stays yours.
tenets.bodyHtml: Who you are is yours to share when you choose. Solidarity here is flat: equal footing, equal voice.

tenets.headline: Shared voice chat.
tenets.bodyHtml: Be chill. Respect boundaries. The fight is out there.

tenets.headline: Solidarity with the colonised.
tenets.bodyHtml: We stand with people against occupation and empire. Anti-fascism includes anti-imperialism; we keep that in how we play and moderate.

tenets.headline: Real life matters more.
tenets.bodyHtml: Grind the game if it brings you joy. Rest, food, and offline people still come first.

tenets.headline: Ask, fail, retry.
tenets.bodyHtml: Every skill level welcome. We care how you treat people when the run falls apart.

callout.title: What this is
paragraphsHtml: A leftist gaming Discord: We say trans rights, we do racial justice, we are anti-fascist, we do mutual care, and we play together.
We show up for each other. Games are an excuse; solidarity is the point.
